The package provides theme, localisation, UI Event, enum and constants and model for CometChat UI Kits: React, Angular, and Vue.

## Features
1. Theme Management
2. Localization
3. UI Event Management
4. Enum and Constants
5. Models

## Peer Dependency
The package is a peer dependency for `@cometchat/uikit-shared` and `@cometchat/uikit-elements`.

## Note
This package is used by the CometChat Web UI Kits internally. The package is not meant to be used without other required CometChat dependencies.

## Help and Support
For issues running the project or integrating with our UI Kits, consult our [documentation](https://www.cometchat.com/docs/uikits/home) or create a [support ticket](https://help.cometchat.com/hc/en-us) or seek real-time support via the [CometChat Dashboard](https://app.cometchat.com/).
